$comment: Single descriptor for a brand/domain fork of this core. Values here MUST match the Dart seams (BrandConfig). The test test/config/fork_config_test.dart enforces that, so this file is the canonical, reviewable description of a fork. See CORE.md for the full fork procedure.

localization.$comment: Languages this fork ships (subset of available) and the first-launch default. Must match LocalizationConfig. RTL is auto-detected from the language code.

theme.$comment: Themes this fork supports and the first-launch default. Must match AppTheme.supportedThemes and ThemeNotifier.defaultThemeMode (order matters).

font.$comment: Default font family (a Google Fonts family) + optional per-language / per-theme overrides. Must match FontConfig.

geography.$comment: Home country for the internal/external route split. Must match GeographyConfig. Matched primarily by ISO country code; names are the fallback. externalRequiresHomeCountryOnOneSide: when true an external route must keep the home country on exactly one side.

backend.$comment: Each fork runs its OWN Supabase + Firebase project. These are NOT committed here; they live in .env (Flutter) and native config files. Listed for the fork checklist only.

nativeChecklist.$comment: Items that do NOT move with a Dart constant and must be changed per fork (see Phase 3 in CORE.md).
